calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa J. Espada, Esq., 415.504.6195, for defendant Lourdes S. Almaguer; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LOURDES ALMAGUER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE default JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Stipulation and order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
